title: Veza Announces Strategic Investments from Capital One Ventures and ServiceNow Ventures
text: PALO ALTO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #cloudsecurity--Veza, the identity security company, today announced that Capital One Ventures and ServiceNow Ventures have made strategic investments in Veza, bringing the company's total financing to $125 million.
